subject: fix(web): map rendering and bottom sheet scrolling on mobile web
body:
Map: Created mapbox.web.ts platform file that exports MAPBOX_TOKEN
without importing @rnmapbox/maps (native-only SDK). The unconditional
native SDK import in mapbox.ts was breaking the module resolution on
web, preventing map initialization entirely.

Bottom sheet: Split into BottomSheetWeb (flex layout with native CSS
scroll) and BottomSheetNative (PanResponder + translateY with snap
points). PanResponder on the content area was intercepting all touch
events on mobile web, making both the filters and station list
completely unscrollable.

Tags: bugfix, web, map, bottom-sheet, platform-split
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-web
Semver: patch
